label: mars-mean-x-down

benchEmulation.note: Bench reproduces the link-budget receivedEbN0Db by transmitting at signalAmplitude against AWGN fixed at noiseFillRms (software), or the equivalent Pluto hardwaregain. Physics is real; distance is emulated.

honest: Eb/N0-equivalence: the bench is not 3-22 light-minutes of vacuum. The link budget is real; the survival claim is that FEC closes the same Eb/N0 the modeled distance/dish/power would deliver.
